description: Looking for some new socks for your baby or junior girl? Quit your browsing now that you've discovered our baby/junior girls organza lace trim ankle socks. High street quality socks at a fraction of the price. Remarkable anklet socks that have been designed with you and your little girl in mind. These ankle socks are perfect for almost any occasion whether it's for everyday outfits, school, first communion, christenings, weddings or parties.
